title: Disenchant Command
description: This mod adds the opposite of the enchant command
body:
Have you ever wanted to remove an enchantment that you acciedentaly enchanted with the /enchant command. Then this mod is the solution, because it adds the /disenchant command!

### Command Usage:

```
/disenchant <targets> <enchantment>
```
This command will remove the specified enchantment from the item in the main hands of the selected entities.
